_description: Canonical pattern catalog. Defines what each lighting pattern IS. Patterns classify lighting styles. Setups implement patterns.

patterns.name: Clamshell
patterns.description: Key above + fill below chin. Minimal shadows, flattering wrap.

patterns.name: Loop
patterns.description: Key 25-45 degrees off axis creating small loop nose shadow.

patterns.name: Rembrandt
patterns.description: Key at 45/45 creating triangle of light on shadow cheek.

patterns.name: Split
patterns.description: Key at 90 degrees illuminating exactly half the face.

patterns.name: Butterfly / Paramount
patterns.description: Key centered above creating butterfly shadow under nose.

patterns.name: Broad
patterns.description: Key illuminates camera-side face, widening apparent shape.

patterns.name: Short
patterns.description: Key illuminates far side of face, slimming apparent shape.

patterns.name: Rim / Edge Light
patterns.description: Subject lit from behind creating bright edge with dark face.

patterns.name: High Key
patterns.description: Even low-contrast lighting with bright white background.

patterns.name: Low Key
patterns.description: High contrast, predominantly dark tones.

patterns.name: Flat Fashion
patterns.description: On-axis even illumination minimizing shadows.

patterns.name: Window Portrait
patterns.description: Natural window light as key. Soft, directional, gentle falloff.

patterns.name: Golden Hour
patterns.description: Low-angle warm sun creating long shadows and golden tones.

patterns.name: Overcast Natural
patterns.description: Diffuse even natural light from overcast sky.

patterns.name: Ring Light
patterns.description: On-axis ring shape, signature circular catchlights.

patterns.name: Bare Bulb Editorial
patterns.description: Hard direct light, sharp shadows, high contrast.

patterns.name: Strip Light Dramatic
patterns.description: Narrow stripbox creating thin band of light.

patterns.name: Short Fashion Key
patterns.description: Short-side key with negative fill and optional rim.

patterns.name: Soft Editorial Key
patterns.description: Large soft source close to subject for wrapped editorial look.

patterns.name: Editorial Rim + Key
patterns.description: Rim-dominant with subtle key fill. Strong edge separation.

patterns.name: Tabletop Soft Product
patterns.description: Overhead softbox for controlled product gradients.

patterns.name: Bottle Backlight
patterns.description: Backlit translucent product with edge rim lights.

patterns.name: Athletic Rim Sculpt
patterns.description: Dual rim lighting sculpting athletic form.

patterns.name: Window Negative Fill
patterns.description: Window light with black v-flat for deeper contrast.
